synopsis: Surrounded by bounty hunters led by IG-88 and Bossk, Luke and Lando are saved when Rik Duel and Dani open fire from hiding, but the hunters regroup and capture Lando and Dani, marching them to a carbon-freezing chamber. Barpotomous Drebble intends to freeze Lando and ship him home, and a bribe and a seduction attempt both fail, though Dani manages to knock out a guard before the pair are recaptured. Luke and Rik ambush the hunters from the rooftops but are quickly overwhelmed, until Chewbacca arrives with a Stenax he has recruited to the cause. Stenax spears cut down the hunters, and Chewbacca stops Bossk and IG-88C from escaping. With Han's trail once again a dead end, the Rebels return to the *Millennium Falcon*, leaving Rik Duel to puzzle over how to free the still-frozen Chihdo. As they depart Stenos, they discover a stowaway: Dani, infatuated with Luke, has decided to come along.
title: Star Wars (1977) #72: Fool's Bounty
